name: magic-mirror-tutor
description: Voice-first tutoring and learning game system for ages 6-8

scripts.db:migrate:001: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U mirror -d mirror_tutor -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/001_initial_schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:002: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U mirror -d mirror_tutor -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/002_v1_1_household_schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:003: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U mirror -d mirror_tutor -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/003_telemetry_events.sql
scripts.db:migrate:004: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U mirror -d mirror_tutor -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/004_content_embeddings.sql
scripts.db:migrate:all: pnpm db:migrate:001 && pnpm db:migrate:002 && pnpm db:migrate:003 && pnpm db:migrate:004
